text: Mom it's me Jake. I lost my phone and I'm using my friend's. I got in a car accident and I'm at the hospital. The insurance hasn't come through yet and I need $800 for the medical bill right now. Please don't call my old number, it's broken. Can you send it through Zelle?

Dad this is Sarah. I'm in a really bad situation. I got arrested at the airport coming back from Mexico. My lawyer says I need $2,500 for bail or I'll be held overnight. Please don't tell mom, she'll panic. Can you wire it to this account: 4829103847?

Grandma it's your grandson Tyler. I'm stranded in Chicago, my wallet got stolen and I missed my flight. I just need $400 to get a new ticket home. I'll pay you back Sunday. Please don't tell Aunt Linda, she'll worry.

Hey Mom, it's Michael. I'm texting from a colleague's phone. My phone got stolen this morning. I have an emergency meeting and I need to pay for something urgently. Can you send $600 to this account right now? I'll explain everything when I get home.

This is your son David. I'm in trouble. I can't explain everything right now but I desperately need $1,200 transferred to a new account. Time is very important. Please do this before 5pm and don't discuss with anyone until I call you.

Mom, don't call my phone, it's broken. I'm using Emily's phone. I had a small accident and the other driver wants cash to avoid involving insurance. I need $950 immediately. I'm fine, just embarrassed. Please don't make a big deal.

Hi Grandpa, it's Jessica your granddaughter. I'm in the hospital after a minor accident. The doctor says I need a procedure that isn't covered by my insurance. I need $1,500 urgently. Don't tell Dad please, I don't want him to worry.

Dad it's Chris. I'm at the police station. Someone planted something in my bag at the airport. My lawyer says I need $3,000 cash bail immediately or I'll be held over the weekend. Please come alone, don't bring Mom.

Mom this is Danny. I got mugged outside the restaurant tonight. They took my phone and wallet. I borrowed someone's phone to text you. I just need $300 to get home and for a new phone. Don't worry, I'm physically okay.

Grandma, it's me, your grandson Kevin. I'm in a lot of trouble and can't talk long. I need you to send $2,000 through Zelle right now to this number/email. Please don't tell Mom, she'll freak out. I'll explain everything tonight. Love you.

This is Officer Williams from the Federal Bureau. Your Social Security number has been used in illegal transactions. You have an active arrest warrant. To resolve this, you must pay a $500 fine immediately via gift card. Call back at this number within 2 hours.

This message is from the IRS. You owe $2,840 in back taxes. Failure to pay immediately will result in arrest. To avoid legal action, call our collections department at the number provided. Do not ignore this notice.

This is the Social Security Administration. Your SSN has been suspended due to suspicious activity. To reactivate your account, you must verify your identity immediately. Failure to respond will result in your arrest within 24 hours.

You have been selected for federal jury duty. You failed to appear. There is now a warrant issued for your arrest. To avoid being taken into custody, you must pay a $750 fine today. Call the court clerk immediately.

This is a final notice from the Department of Homeland Security. Your name is connected to a money laundering case. To prevent arrest, you must cooperate immediately. Call our investigation hotline now. This is your only warning.

Your Medicare benefits have been flagged for fraud. Unless you call to verify your identity today, your benefits will be permanently suspended and charges may be filed. This is an urgent matter requiring immediate action.

This is Officer Rodriguez from the county sheriff. We have a warrant for your arrest for failure to pay a court fine. You may avoid arrest by calling our office today and paying $1,200 fine using Google Play gift cards.

Federal alert: Your bank account has been linked to drug trafficking activity. The DEA has frozen your assets. To release your funds and avoid arrest, contact Agent Thompson at our secure line within 24 hours.

This is the U.S. Customs and Border Protection. A package seized at the border was addressed to you and contained illegal substances. You must call our compliance line immediately or face criminal charges.

FINAL NOTICE: You owe the IRS $4,200. Your case has been transferred to local law enforcement. A warrant will be issued in 4 hours unless you call to make immediate payment. Stay at your current location.

Hi, I'm traveling and in back-to-back meetings. I need you to process an urgent wire transfer of $47,500 to a new vendor account today. Details: Bank of America, routing 026009593, account 4891023476. This is time-sensitive. Please confirm once done.

This is an urgent request from the CEO. We are closing a confidential acquisition and need to transfer $82,000 to an escrow account by end of day. Do not discuss with other staff. Wire to: Citibank, acct 3847291056. Confirm receipt of this email.

Per our conversation, please process the vendor payment for the project materials. The supplier changed their banking details. New account: Wells Fargo, routing 121042882, acct 7823041956. Amount: $23,400. Process today.

Hi, I need a favor. I'm in a client meeting and can't talk. Can you purchase 10 x $200 Amazon gift cards for a client appreciation event? Scratch the back and send me the codes via email ASAP. I'll reimburse you tomorrow. Keep this between us for now.

Urgent: Our usual international wire service is down. Please process an emergency payment of $156,000 to our partner in Singapore. Account details: DBS Bank, account 047-902341-0, SWIFT: DBSSSGSG. This must go out before 3pm our time.

Hello, updating you that our company auditor requires a one-time direct payment of $34,000 outside our normal process for compliance reasons. Wire to account provided. This is confidential per legal advice. Please do not document in the usual system.

Hi Team, we've signed a new contract and the vendor requires upfront payment before starting work. Please wire $67,500 to the account below. CFO has approved but is unavailable by phone today. Transfer needs to go out within 2 hours.

This is James calling from accounts. Our banking portal is under maintenance. I need you to process a manual wire of $29,000 to a client account. I'll email you the details now. Please don't use the internal system for this one, go direct through the bank.

I'm reaching out on behalf of our director who is traveling internationally. We have an outstanding invoice of $41,200 that must be cleared today to avoid a contract penalty. New payment details have been provided by the vendor. Please process urgently.

Quick request — we need to pay a consultant $18,500 for a project completed last week. They've sent a new invoice with different bank details. I need this done before end of day. Don't run through procurement this time, just direct wire.

My darling, I have been thinking about you all day. This connection we have is something I have never felt before. I am so sorry I cannot video call right now, my camera is broken. I am saving up to come visit you. I just need a small loan of $800 to cover my flight ticket.

My love, I am stranded at the airport in Dubai. My wallet was stolen and I have missed my connecting flight. I just need $600 for a new ticket and a hotel for tonight. I promise I will pay you back the moment I land. Please, you are the only person I can trust.

Sweetheart, I need to tell you something. I am actually a military officer deployed overseas. I have been saving my pay and I need to transfer my funds out of this country, but I need a US bank account to do so. Can I use yours? Once it's in your account, we can move it to mine and I'll take care of you generously for helping me.

My angel, I have finally received clearance to come home. But the base requires a processing fee of $1,200 to release me from deployment. Once I am home I will never leave you again. Can you help me with this one last thing? I love you so much.

Hello my love, I am a doctor working with MSF in Yemen. I have been saving $450,000 to start a new life with you. The only problem is getting the funds out requires paying a tax of $2,000 to the local authorities. Can you help? We can be together soon.

Darling, I know we have not met in person yet but you mean everything to me. I have been in a road accident and my medical bills are $1,400. I have no one else to turn to. Once I recover I will fly to you immediately. Please help me.

My dearest, I was hoping to surprise you with a visit but customs is holding a package I was sending you as a gift. They want $350 in duties to release it. It is full of things I bought for you. Can you pay this so I can send it to you?

I know this may seem fast but I feel I have known you all my life. I have a business opportunity I want to share with you. A small investment of $3,000 now will earn us both $25,000 in 30 days. I want us to build a future together.

My love, I have been selected for a new contract in the US. I finally get to come to you. But first I need to pay a visa processing fee of $900. Can you help me just this once? I promise this will be the last time I ask. I cannot wait to hold you.

Good morning beautiful. I dreamed about you again. My phone credit is running low and I may lose contact with you. Can you send a $50 recharge to this number? I could not bear to lose our connection. You are the best thing that has ever happened to me.
USPS: Your package delivery was attempted. To reschedule delivery, confirm your address and pay a $3.50 redelivery fee at: usps-redelivery-confirm.com
FedEx Alert: Your shipment is on hold due to an incomplete address. Update your delivery information within 24 hours to avoid return: fedex-update-address.net/track
DHL Notice: Your international package has been held at customs. A customs clearance fee of $12.99 is required for release. Pay now: dhl-customs-clearance.com/pay
Your Amazon package could not be delivered. We require updated payment information to process a $1.99 redelivery fee. Click here to update: amazon-delivery-confirm.net
UPS: Package 1Z9847A requires a signature confirmation. You have 48 hours to confirm or the package will be returned. Confirm here: ups-signature-required.com
Delivery notification: We attempted to deliver your item but nobody was home. A $2.99 storage fee will apply each day. Reschedule at: delivery-reschedule-now.com/track
USPS Package Alert: Your shipment has been suspended. There is an unpaid balance of $4.30. Failure to pay within 12 hours will result in the package being returned. Pay: post-track-payment.com
Your parcel from China has arrived at LAX customs. Import duties of $22.50 must be paid before release. Pay within 48 hours: customs-clearance-fee.com/pay
Royal Mail: We could not deliver your parcel today. To arrange redelivery, please confirm your details and pay 1.45 pounds here: royalmail-redelivery.co.uk-tracking.net
Cainiao Logistics: Your package has cleared customs. Final delivery requires address verification. Please update your information within 24 hours: cainiao-delivery-update.com
Chase Bank: We have detected unusual activity on your account. Your account has been temporarily limited. To restore access, verify your information at: chase-secure-verify.com/login
Wells Fargo Alert: Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Reactivate immediately at: wellsfargo-account-restore.net to avoid account closure.
Bank of America Security: Your debit card has been used in a suspicious transaction of $847.23. If this was not you, call 1-800-432-1000 or click here to dispute: boa-fraud-alert.com/dispute
Citibank: Your account statement is ready. We have detected irregularities in your recent transactions. Please review and confirm your information: citibank-review-account.com
Your PayPal account has been suspended. Unusual login detected from Romania. To appeal the suspension, verify your identity within 24 hours: paypal-account-appeal.com
TD Bank Notice: Your online banking password will expire in 24 hours. Click here to update your credentials and maintain access: tdbank-password-update.com/secure
Venmo Security Alert: Someone attempted to access your account. Confirm your identity to secure your funds: venmo-account-confirm.net/verify. If you did not attempt this, call us immediately.
Capital One: Your credit card ending in 4729 was used for a $1,204.00 transaction. If unrecognized, verify your account at: capitalone-fraud-review.com within 12 hours.
Your Zelle transfer of $450 is pending verification. To complete or cancel this transfer, verify your banking details at: zelle-transfer-verify.com
HSBC Alert: Your account has been flagged for a compliance review. To avoid suspension, submit your verification documents at: hsbc-compliance-check.com/verify within 48 hours.
You have won a $500 Amazon gift card! As a loyal customer, you have been selected for our monthly reward. Claim your prize at: amazon-rewards-monthly.com/claim. Offer expires in 24 hours.
Your Netflix subscription payment has failed. Update your billing information to continue watching: netflix-billing-update.net/account. Your subscription will be cancelled in 48 hours.
Congratulations! You have been selected for a free iPhone 15 Pro. Complete a short survey to claim: apple-survey-reward.com. Only 3 spots remaining today.
Your Google account has been accessed from an unknown device in Russia. Secure your account now: google-account-security-alert.com/verify or your account will be closed.
Microsoft Windows Alert: Your computer has been infected with 5 viruses. Your personal data is at risk. Call our support team immediately at 1-844-892-1234 or click: microsoft-security-scan.com
Spotify: Your free trial has ended. To continue listening, update your payment details at: spotify-payment-update.com/billing. Don't miss your favorite playlists.
Costco Members Only: As a thank you for your loyalty, you have been chosen for a special $200 shopping reward. Verify your membership at: costco-member-reward.net/claim
Your Instagram account will be disabled for community guideline violations. Appeal this decision within 24 hours: instagram-appeal-center.com/submit or your account will be permanently removed.
Congratulations from T-Mobile! You have qualified for a bill credit of $75. Verify your account to apply the credit: tmobile-bill-credit.com/apply. Expires this week.
LinkedIn: Someone viewed your profile 43 times this week. See who is interested in your experience. Upgrade your account: linkedin-profile-views-premium.com/unlock
Hey Mom, can you pick me up from soccer practice at 5:30? Coach says we're finishing early today.
Hi honey, I'm running 20 minutes late for dinner. Traffic on the freeway is terrible. Can you hold the food?
Dad, can you send me $40 for groceries? I'll pay you back when I see you Sunday. Venmo is @jake-miller22
Good morning! Don't forget we have the Johnson account review at 2pm today. Conference room B. Bring the Q3 reports.
Hey, are you free this weekend? We're throwing a birthday party for Sarah on Saturday night. Let me know if you can come!
Reminder: Your dentist appointment is scheduled for Tuesday, March 12 at 10:00 AM. Please call 555-0182 to confirm or reschedule.
Hi, your Amazon order has shipped! Estimated delivery: Friday. Track your package in the Amazon app.
Just finished the report you asked for. I've attached the final version. Let me know if you need any changes before the meeting.
Mom, I love you! Thank you for everything you do for our family. Can't wait to see you at Christmas. Hugs and kisses.
Team, the Monday standup is moved to 10am this week due to the all-hands meeting. Same Zoom link. See you there!
